measurement_note: Size is V, the Visits row count; each tier has V distinct customers and V/2 transaction rows attached to the first half of visits. The Accepted left anti-join and an independent uncorrelated NOT IN materialization have an O((V+T) log(V+T)) portable bound. A correct correlated COUNT subquery rescans Transactions for every visit, performs O(VT) work, completes all 32/128/512 tiers, and is rejected only by scaling. An unindexed correlated NOT EXISTS draft also exhibited slower growth and was rejected as the independent passing candidate.
